name: AI Customizer Manager
description: Creates, improves, versions, and classifies customs in the AI Customizer catalog.

versions.changelog: Initial release — catalog-aware manager for skills, agents, and patches.

Project inference from cwd (suggestion mode); patch auto-detection with .original baseline + blocking validations; gentle-ai detection via <!-- gentle-ai:* --> tag scan; guided exploration protocol (no subagent delegation, read-only outside write scope); agent creation collaborative checklist (Paso 2.10).

Skill creation now produces proper YAML frontmatter per tool: Claude gets full schema (name, description, optional when_to_use/paths/allowed-tools/etc.) for semantic auto-activation and paths-based triggers; Opencode gets reduced schema (name, description, optional license/compatibility/metadata) — Claude-only fields stripped from the mirror to avoid misleading readers. New Paso 2.11 collaborative questions for skill frontmatter (description + optional paths). Paso 4.3 rewritten with the mandatory frontmatter block and writing guidance (front-load use case, 1536-char budget, paths is Claude-only).
